methods.description: This method involves analyzing the geographical distribution of M. (I.) cabrerae using current distribution data and historical archaeopalaeontological site data to understand changes over time.

steps.description: We used the current distribution of the species taken from Shenbrot & Krasnov (2005).
steps.searchable_summary: retrieve current distribution data of M. (I.) cabrerae from Shenbrot & Krasnov (2005)

steps.description: Together with data from previously published archaeopalaeontological sites of the Late Pleistocene and beginning of the Holocene where M. (I.) cabrerae occurs.
steps.searchable_summary: gather archaeopalaeontological site data for M. (I.) cabrerae from Late Pleistocene and Holocene

steps.description: The nomenclature used in the descriptions of the M. (I.) cabrerae teeth is that of van der Meulen (1973).
steps.searchable_summary: apply van der Meulen (1973) nomenclature to M. (I.) cabrerae teeth descriptions
